# output.loo_posterior_table { #tspaint.output.loo_posterior_table }

```python
tspaint.output.loo_posterior_table(
    ts,
    Q,
    pi,
    emissions,
    focal=None,
    merge_tol=1e-12,
    tree_range=None,
    progress=False,
)
```

Per-sample **leave-one-out** ancestry posterior as contiguous segments.

Like :func:`posterior_table` but paints the *outside message* — what the rest of
the tree says about each focal sample's ancestry, **excluding that sample's own
emission** (``PruneResult.loo``). For a labelled reference this is the
introgression / mislabel map: where its own genealogy dissents from its label
(CLAUDE.md §2.3, §9). Unlike the down-pass :func:`posterior_table`, it is *not*
suppressed by a confident (e.g. hard-clamped, one-hot) tip emission, so it surfaces a
reference's foreign tracts even where the down-pass posterior is pinned to the label.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   As for :func:`posterior_table` (``progress`` shows a per-marginal-tree bar for the full-genome pass). For a parallel leave-one-out paint use :func:`tspaint.parallel.loo_posterior_table_parallel`.

<code>[**Q**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   As for :func:`posterior_table` (``progress`` shows a per-marginal-tree bar for the full-genome pass). For a parallel leave-one-out paint use :func:`tspaint.parallel.loo_posterior_table_parallel`.

<code>[**pi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   As for :func:`posterior_table` (``progress`` shows a per-marginal-tree bar for the full-genome pass). For a parallel leave-one-out paint use :func:`tspaint.parallel.loo_posterior_table_parallel`.

<code>[**emissions**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   As for :func:`posterior_table` (``progress`` shows a per-marginal-tree bar for the full-genome pass). For a parallel leave-one-out paint use :func:`tspaint.parallel.loo_posterior_table_parallel`.

<code>[**focal**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   As for :func:`posterior_table` (``progress`` shows a per-marginal-tree bar for the full-genome pass). For a parallel leave-one-out paint use :func:`tspaint.parallel.loo_posterior_table_parallel`.

<code>[**merge_tol**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   As for :func:`posterior_table` (``progress`` shows a per-marginal-tree bar for the full-genome pass). For a parallel leave-one-out paint use :func:`tspaint.parallel.loo_posterior_table_parallel`.

<code>[**progress**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   As for :func:`posterior_table` (``progress`` shows a per-marginal-tree bar for the full-genome pass). For a parallel leave-one-out paint use :func:`tspaint.parallel.loo_posterior_table_parallel`.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[Segment](`tspaint.output.Segment`)\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per focal sample, the leave-one-out posterior as contiguous :class:`Segment`\ s covering ``[0, L)``.
